refined_caption: There is water on the hospital floor and people are walking in the hallway. The water appears to be a puddle.
complaint_description: I was visiting my family member on the general ward and noticed a large puddle of water on the floor. It's a slipping hazard and could cause someone to fall. The hospital staff should clean it up immediately.
voice_text: There's water all over the floor in the hospital hallway, it's really slippery and someone's gonna get hurt.
